prompt: A dreamy vertical spring portrait photo of a young woman standing in profile in a vast field of tiny blue nemophila flowers under a bright blue sky with soft white clouds. She wears a fitted ribbed knit dress in {argument name="dress color" default="pale sky blue"} with elbow-length sleeves, and her long straight brown hair is blowing dramatically to the right in the wind. Frame her from about mid-thigh upward, slightly off-center to the right, with the flower field filling the background and a small rope fence with wooden posts visible along the lower right edge beside a gravel path. Use soft natural morning sunlight, airy high-key exposure, gentle pastel tones, shallow depth of field, subtle lens bloom, and a romantic social-media snapshot aesthetic. Add a few large out-of-focus white flower petals drifting across the foreground. Overlay handwritten white Japanese text directly on the image: at the upper left, "{argument name="greeting text" default="おはよう"}" with a small doodled cloud beside it; below that, the date "{argument name="date text" default="2026.04.22"}"; across the lower middle-right, "{argument name="main note text" default="嫁と ネモフィラデート✌︎"}"; and beneath it, "{argument name="sub note text" default="に使っていいよっ♡"}". Keep the handwriting casual, playful, and slightly uneven like a marker pen on a photo.
translatedPrompt: 一张梦幻般的竖版春日人像摄影，一位年轻女性侧身站在广阔的蓝色粉蝶花田中，背景是明亮的蓝天和柔和的白云。她身穿一件 {argument name="dress color" default="淡天蓝色"} 的修身罗纹针织连衣裙，袖长及肘，一头棕色长直发在风中向右飘动。构图从大腿中部向上取景，人物略微偏向右侧，背景铺满花海，右下角可见碎石路旁带有木桩的小绳围栏。采用柔和的自然晨光、通透的高调曝光、淡雅的色调、浅景深、细腻的镜头光晕，以及浪漫的社交媒体快照美学。在前景中加入几片虚化的大型白色花瓣。在图像上直接叠加手写风格的白色日文：左上角为“{argument name="greeting text" default="おはよう"}”并配有一个涂鸦小云朵；下方为日期“{argument name="date text" default="2026.04.22"}”；中右下方为“{argument name="main note text" default="嫁と ネモフィラデート✌︎"}”；其下方为“{argument name="sub note text" default="に使っていいよっ♡"}”。保持手写字体随性、俏皮且略带不规则感，如同用马克笔在照片上书写的效果。

breakdown.creativeCore: 梦幻粉蝶花约会人像：生成一张柔和浪漫的竖版人像，画面中一位女性置身于蓝色花海，并配有手写风格的日文晨间问候文字，非常适合社交媒体视觉呈现。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, lens]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
